# HandPlatter

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::HandPlatter;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        HandPlatter { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
waiter, waitress, restaurant, table service, served, dinner, dining, meal, course, luxury

food-beverage, people
